greeting:
Hey, I'm Zoe 😊 

I'll keep you updated on power outage schedules

To get started, just send me your outage group number or several group numbers (for example: 1.1, 1.2)
groupSetOne:
Great! Your group is {{groupNumber}} ⚡ 
I'll keep an eye on things for you 👀
groupSetOther:
Great! Your groups are {{groupNumber}} ⚡ 
I'll keep an eye on things for you 👀
wrongGroup:
That one confused me a bit 😅 
Try sending just the group number or several group numbers (for example: 1.1, 1.2)
wrongGroupCommand:
That one confused me a bit 😅 
Correct command - /group <value>
Example: /group 1.2
wrongLocale:
Unsupported language 😅 
Correct command - /locale <en/ru/ua>
Example: /locale en
tomorrowMissing:
Looks like tomorrow's outage schedule hasn't been published yet.
I'll notify you when it's published 👀
helpGroup: /group <number> <number> - Change your group number or set multiple groups (e.g. /group 1.2 1.3)
